name: Spicy, Tomato-Based Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds parsnips, in chunks (proportion according to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough vegetable oil in a large pot.
2. Add the chopped onions and sauté until translucent.
3. Stir in 2 cloves of minced garlic and 1/2 hot chili pepper; cook for about 30 seconds, being careful not to burn the peppers.
4. Add the carrot, turnip, and parsnip chunks (proportions can vary based on preference).
5. Cook the vegetables until they begin to soften, then add the quartered mushrooms.
6. Pour in enough chicken stock to cover the vegetables by about an inch.
7. Stir in 1 small can of tomato paste, breaking it up with a spoon if clumped.
8. Season with oregano and basil, adjusting to taste.
9. Simmer until all vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
10. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
11. Serve the stew over couscous.
